pr.title: gr Shrineroute and Kinokoroute matches, function renaming
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: PR 2296 was a broad decomp-matching and naming cleanup slice centered on grshrineroute and grkinokoroute. The bot report records 2 new 100% matches in main/melee/gr/grshrineroute, a near-match improvement for grKinokoRoute_8020754C, and a .data improvement for grkinokoroute. The diff also shows project-wide callsite churn from HSD_GObjProc_8038FD54 to HSD_GObj_SetupProc and from Ground_801C14D0 to Ground_GetStageGObj, plus header signature updates for recovered route functions.

key_files.role: Primary matched route implementation; grShrineRoute_8020AD58 and grShrineRoute_8020B020 were replaced from nonmatching stubs/placeholders with C bodies.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grShrineRoute_8020AD58 changed from /// # placeholder to void grShrineRoute_8020AD58(Ground*, int, CollData*, int, int)
raw_diff: grShrineRoute_8020B020 changed from /// # placeholder to C body with comp = r4 - 189 and for (i = 0; i < 6; i++)
text_corpus.issue_comment: bot report lists grShrineRoute_8020AD58 +176 and grShrineRoute_8020B020 +140 as new 100% matches

key_files.role: Header signature updated for recovered grShrineRoute_8020AD58 body.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grShrineRoute_8020AD58 prototype changed from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to void grShrineRoute_8020AD58(Ground*, int, CollData*, int, int)

key_files.role: Primary near-match improvement; grKinokoRoute_8020754C implemented as a stage GObj creation/setup helper.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grKinokoRoute_8020754C changed from /// # placeholder to HSD_GObj* grKinokoRoute_8020754C(int gobj_id)
text_corpus.issue_comment: bot report lists grKinokoRoute_8020754C +231 from 0.00% to 99.97%

key_files.role: Header return type updated to match recovered grKinokoRoute_8020754C body.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grKinokoRoute_8020754C prototype changed from void grKinokoRoute_8020754C(int) to HSD_GObj* grKinokoRoute_8020754C(int)

key_files.role: Symbol metadata and global function names updated.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: Ground_801C14D0 renamed to Ground_GetStageGObj at .text:0x801C14D0
raw_diff: HSD_GObjProc_8038FD54 renamed to HSD_GObj_SetupProc at .text:0x8038FD54

key_files.role: Ground helper callsites/signature surface touched as part of Ground_GetStageGObj rename.
evidence_refs: raw_diff excerpts show many stage files replacing Ground_801C14D0 calls with Ground_GetStageGObj

key_files.role: Large header churn in loaded changed-file metadata; exact semantic change not visible in supplied excerpt.
Large game-mode callsite/formatting churn; exact semantic change not fully visible in supplied excerpt.
evidence_refs: raw_diff excerpt includes HSD_GObj_SetupProc callsite replacements in game-mode files

key_files.role: Fighter process setup callsites renamed to HSD_GObj_SetupProc.
evidence_refs: raw_diff grep: fighter process setup list replaces HSD_GObjProc_8038FD54 with HSD_GObj_SetupProc

key_files.role: Effect library callsites renamed and minor formatting/include churn.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: efLib_8005B4B8 and efLib_8005BE88 replace HSD_GObjProc_8038FD54 with HSD_GObj_SetupProc

what_changed: Changed-file metadata reports 191 files touched with 1494 additions and 1514 deletions.
Bot report records matched code 57.96%, +0.01%, +316 bytes for GALE01 from base 2706099 to head 5bb3210.
Two new 100% matches were credited in main/melee/gr/grshrineroute: grShrineRoute_8020AD58 (+176 bytes) and grShrineRoute_8020B020 (+140 bytes).
grKinokoRoute_8020754C in main/melee/gr/grkinokoroute improved by +231 bytes from 0.00% to 99.97%, but the evidence does not show a full 100% match.
main/melee/gr/grkinokoroute .data improved by +80 bytes from 0.00% to 33.47%.
The symbol Ground_801C14D0 was renamed to Ground_GetStageGObj and many stage callsites were updated accordingly.
The symbol HSD_GObjProc_8038FD54 was renamed to HSD_GObj_SetupProc and many camera, effect, fighter, game-mode, menu, and stage callsites were updated accordingly.
Recovered function signatures were propagated into headers, including grShrineRoute_8020AD58 and grKinokoRoute_8020754C.
The diff contains substantial formatting and include-order churn in files such as ef_061D.c, eflib.c, ftCo_Attack100.c, dballoc.c, and eflib.h.

smart_moves.text: The PR paired recovered C bodies with header prototype updates instead of leaving UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS or stale return types.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grkinokoroute.h updates grKinokoRoute_8020754C return type to HSD_GObj*

smart_moves.text: Broadly applying the newly named HSD_GObj_SetupProc and Ground_GetStageGObj made repeated callsites more readable and consistent with the new symbol names.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt renames HSD_GObjProc_8038FD54 and Ground_801C14D0
raw_diff excerpts: camera.c, eflib.c, fighter.c, and many gr files update callsites

smart_moves.text: The PR kept the near-match status of grKinokoRoute_8020754C visible via bot output rather than implying it was fully matched.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a route/stage helper body proves its return type, update the owning header in the same slice so callers and prototypes reflect the recovered signature.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grKinokoRoute_8020754C body returns HSD_GObj* and header changes from void to HSD_GObj*
raw_diff: grShrineRoute_8020AD58 header changes from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to a typed signature

decomp_lessons.lesson: A broadly reused address-style helper can be renamed when the PR also updates the central symbol metadata and callsites consistently.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt renames HSD_GObjProc_8038FD54 to HSD_GObj_SetupProc
raw_diff: symbols.txt renames Ground_801C14D0 to Ground_GetStageGObj

decomp_lessons.lesson: Bot match reports should distinguish full matches from high-percentage improvements; grKinokoRoute_8020754C was only reported at 99.97%.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.issue_comment: grShrineRoute functions explicitly listed under 2 new matches

naming_conventions.name: Ground_GetStageGObj
naming_conventions.text: Address-style Ground_801C14D0 was replaced with semantic Ground_GetStageGObj in symbols.txt and stage callsites.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: stage files replace Ground_801C14D0(gobj_id) with Ground_GetStageGObj(gobj_id)

naming_conventions.name: HSD_GObj_SetupProc
naming_conventions.text: Address-style HSD_GObjProc_8038FD54 was replaced with HSD_GObj_SetupProc in symbols.txt and many process setup callsites.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: camera.c, eflib.c, ftCo_09F4.c, fighter.c, gm files, and stage files update callsites

naming_conventions.name: grShrineRoute_8020AD58 typed parameters
naming_conventions.text: The function stayed address-style because a stronger semantic name was not introduced, but the prototype gained typed parameters: Ground*, int, CollData*, int, int.

naming_conventions.name: grKinokoRoute_8020754C return type
naming_conventions.text: The function stayed address-style but its return type changed from void to HSD_GObj*.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: PAD_STACK retained in recovered stage-route code.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: grShrineRoute_8020AD58 includes PAD_STACK(0x10). The supplied evidence shows this in a function reported as a new 100% match, but does not include build logs beyond the bot report.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Small counted loop for repeated route state updates.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: grShrineRoute_8020B020 uses comp = r4 - 189 and for (i = 0; i < 6; i++), consistent with using natural loops for repeated indexed work when they verify.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Central helper rename plus callsite rewrite.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: The PR changed many identical process-setup calls from an address-style function to HSD_GObj_SetupProc, reducing repeated unknown-name noise without altering call shape in excerpts.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: HSD_GObjProc_8038FD54 callsites replaced with HSD_GObj_SetupProc

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: GALE01 report: matched code 57.96% (+0.01%, +316 bytes); 2 new matches in grshrineroute; 2 improvements in unmatched items for grkinokoroute function and .data.

review_feedback.author: ribbanya
review_feedback.text: A review record exists with state DISMISSED and an empty body. No human review feedback or reviewer intent is available in the loaded evidence.

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR identity, merge state, author, changed-file counts, changed-file metadata
raw_diff: truncated but includes central symbol renames, representative callsite rewrites, and route function bodies/prototypes
text_corpus: complete PR body/comment/review corpus with empty PR body, one bot report, and one dismissed empty review
notes: The raw diff and changed_files loaded files are truncated; only representative file-level details are available for many of the 191 changed files.
The PR body is empty, so author intent is inferred only from title, diff, changed-file metadata, and bot report.
No inline review comments are available. The only human review record is dismissed and has no body.
The bot report is strong evidence for match percentages but is not a substitute for detailed local objdiff logs for every formatting or helper rename.
Because the PR mixed true matches, near-match improvement, broad renames, header changes, and formatting churn, broad lessons should be curated carefully.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Update headers when recovered bodies prove signatures
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR 2296, recovered route functions were accompanied by header signature updates: grShrineRoute_8020AD58 changed away from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS, and grKinokoRoute_8020754C changed from void to HSD_GObj*. This is a useful local example of truthful header maintenance during matching.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Preserve distinction between match and near-match in postmortems
accepted_candidate_records.text: The bot report for PR 2296 lists grShrineRoute_8020AD58 and grShrineRoute_8020B020 as new 100% matches, while grKinokoRoute_8020754C only improved to 99.97%. Intake and curation should keep these statuses separate.

source_update_candidates.reason: This is a PR-specific path fact candidate about reported matching progress; curator should decide whether to store it.

rejection_notes: Do not record grKinokoRoute_8020754C as a full match based on this PR slice; the bot report says 99.97%.
Do not infer reviewer approval rationale from the dismissed empty review record.
Do not promote a blanket standard that PAD_STACK is acceptable here beyond this PR's narrow evidence; only one recovered function excerpt and the bot report are loaded.
Do not treat the broad formatting/include churn as a reusable decomp tactic without additional evidence; much of the diff is truncated and no reviewer comments explain those edits.
Do not claim all 191 changed files were inspected in detail; loaded evidence only supports representative and metadata-level summaries for many files.
